positive: A stylized, minimalist illustration of a lunar landscape seen from a low, dynamic angle. Two elegant silhouettes of a winged owl and a stylized comet arc across the foreground. The scene is dominated by deep sapphire blue and metallic silver gradients, contrasted sharply by glowing amber nebula clouds in the distance. Use thick, clean vector lines, high contrast, and a limited color palette of blue, silver, and gold. The composition must be perfectly circular and suitable for a t-shirt print, ensuring clean edges and no complex background textures. Pop art, vector art, graphic novel aesthetic, centered composition, perfect symmetry.
